tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: Fingerstyle arrangement with D drop tuning.

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

recommended.version_description: Acoustic arrangement w/ flavor for playing with song or solo w/ vocals.

content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Em7[/ch]
   It’s undeniable that we should be together.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]                            [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]
   It’s unbelievable, how I used to say that I’d fall never.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                              [ch]Em7[/ch]
    The basis is ‘need to know’; if you don’t know just how I feel[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Then let me show you that now that I’m for real[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]
If all things in time, time will reveal.  Yeah.[/tab]

 [Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
One, you’re like a dream come true.  Two, just wanna’ be with you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]                                   [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]D7[/ch]
Three, Girl it’s plain to see that you’re the only one for me, and[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
Four, repeat steps one through three. Five, make you fall in love with me.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]D7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
If ever I believe my work is done, I’ll start back at one.[/tab]

 [Verse 2]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]
    It’s so incredible, the way things work themselves out,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]                               [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]D7[/ch]
    And all emotional, once you know what it’s all about, hey,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Em7[/ch]
    And undesirable, for us to be apart.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I never would’ve made it very far,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]D7[/ch]
cause you know you got the keys to my heart.[/tab]

 [Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                       [ch]Em7[/ch]
One, you’re like a dream come true.  Two, just wanna’ be with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]                                      [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]
Three, Girl it’s plain to see that you’re the only one for me, and[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                       [ch]Em7[/ch]
Four, repeat steps one through three. Five, make you fall in love with me.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]
If ever I believe my work is done...[/tab]

 [Bridge]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]                                            [ch]C9[/ch]
Say farewell to the dark of night; I see the coming of the sun.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                [ch]E7[/ch]
I feel like a little child whose life has just begun.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]                                    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
You came and breathed new life into this lonely heart of mine.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]                        [ch]D7[/ch]
You threw out the lifeline just in the nick of time.[/tab]

[Outro] (optional Capo 5th Fret)
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
One, you’re like a dream come true.  Two, just wanna’ be with you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]                                   [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]D7[/ch]
Three, Girl it’s plain to see that you’re the only one for me, and[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                       [ch]Em7[/ch]
Four, repeat steps one through three. Five, make you fall in love with me.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]D7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
If ever I believe my work is done, I’ll start back at one.[/tab]
